user.title: Configure Generic Hygrostat
user.description: Provide the parameters to dynamically compute humidity trigger spikes.

data_description.sensor: The input humidity sensor tracked for rapid moisture fluctuations.

data_description.delta_trigger: The percentage rise over the sample interval needed to activate.
data_description.target_offset: The target drop percentage below baseline to turn off.
data_description.sample_interval: How far back in history to analyze changes.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to poll data from target humidity engine.

abort.already_configured: An integration instance with this name already exists.

init.title: Configure Generic Hygrostat Options
init.description: Tweak operational trigger behaviors dynamically without deleting your sensor.

deprecated_yaml.title: Legacy YAML configuration detected
deprecated_yaml.description:
Your Generic Hygrostat configuration has been successfully imported into the UI.

Please remove the `- platform: generic_hygrostat` block from your `configuration.yaml` file and restart Home Assistant to clear this warning.
